name: JUST IN (via DSCC)
subject: Under the cover of darkness
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Stand with Senate Democrats to protect health care for all at any cost.
---
[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ecfa/2b07114c/453f2d08/736ab69b/3071057883/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/stand-up-to-the-gop?source=PT-20170210-JustIn_DS-Pros")
Friend --

While most of us were sleeping last night, Republicans pushed through a party-line vote to confirm Tom Price as Health and Human Services Secretary.

Now the architect of a central GOP plan to dismantle the Affordable Care Act, who called Medicare "government's intrusion into medicine," is in charge of our nation's health programs.

Quietly confirming President Trump's nominees in the dark, silencing Elizabeth Warren from the Senate floor, or suspending Senate rules to make sure no Democratic Senators can ask tough questions -- none of this is normal.

So we need to make it clear to Republicans that we see what they're doing -- and that their actions will have consequences.

**[Friend, will you speak out? Add your name to stand with Senate Democrats.](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ecfa/2b07114c/453f2d08/736ab69b/3071057883/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/stand-up-to-the-gop?source=PT-20170210-JustIn_DS-Pros")**

Now that Price has been confirmed, the fight for the Affordable Care Act is moving into a new phase. Whether Republicans move to force 32 million people off their health insurance or if they start to whisper about privatizing Medicare -- we're prepared to be relentless.

The fact they're going to these lengths to install their team and move forward on their agenda speaks volumes.

**So we need to show we're all in this together, friend. We're counting on you to take a stand.**

**Make sure your voice is part of this fight and add your name today:**

**[https://dscc.org/stand-up-to-the-gop](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ecfa/2b07114c/453f2d08/736ab69b/3071057883/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/stand-up-to-the-gop?source=PT-20170210-JustIn_DS-Pros")**

Thanks for everything you do,
Team DSCC

**A quick note on donations, Friend:**

We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts.

Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back.

[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-20170210-JustIn_DS-Pros&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ecfa/2b07114c/453f2d08/736ab695/3071057883/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ecfa/2b07114c/453f2d08/736ab694/3071057883/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ecfa/2b07114c/453f2d08/736ab697/3071057883/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: DNC War Room
subject: TRUMP POLL UPDATE FOR YOU:
body:

If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c684/4067b0a/2ceb611c6/7e7ae498/3046202400/VEsHBg/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170211_dnc_nd&source=em_20170211_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170211_dnc_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c684/4067b0a/2ceb611c6/7e7ae499/3046202400/VEsHAQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170211_dnc_nd&source=em_20170211_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170211_dnc_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c684/4067b0a/2ceb611c6/7e7ae4a6/3046202400/VEsHAA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=15+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170211_dnc_nd&source=em_20170211_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170211_dnc_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c684/4067b0a/2ceb611c6/7e7ae4a7/3046202400/VEsHAw/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=16+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170211_dnc_nd&source=em_20170211_dnc_nd&refcode=em_20170211_dnc_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

|

name: =?UTF-8?Q?DonaldJTrump=2Ecom?=
subject: It’s time to fight back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
President Trump refuses to stop fighting. But he needs you by his side. |

Friend, Since Inauguration Day, Democrats have made it their mission to obstruct President Trump -- and your voice. ...They promised to block our Supreme Court nominee even BEFORE he was announced. ...They’ve done everything in their power to delay confirmation of our cabinet -- an extreme level of obstruction that no president has faced in recent history. ...They’ve even run ads to distort our message and deceive the people on a massive scale. It’s time to fight back, Friend. Please contribute $100, $65, $50, $30, $25, or $10 to help us build a war chest to support President Trump as we face an onslaught of attacks from the far Left. Radical organizations like the ACLU have raised tens of millions of dollars to back up Democrats as they fight tooth and nail to save what’s left of Obama’s legacy. President Trump refuses to let obstructionism get in the way. He refuses to let the media take the reins of our country. But he needs your help. We need to once again harness the same grassroots energy that led us to victory last year. Please contribute $100, $65, $50, $30, $25, or $10 to help us build a war chest to support President Trump as we face an onslaught of attacks from the far Left. Thank you, Team TRUMP
CONTRIBUTE NOW

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.
Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J. Trump for President, Inc. and the Republican National Committee.

name: The White House
subject: Support Judge Gorsuch
body:
We need conservative principles back on the Supreme Court. |
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=baf394c5cf0f103d6dc332820a18c70509aa7b7d614662754a7911ac5d040000c629e04bfa27e426703abd3118ccabc7cc67a103e96b34a7)
A little over a week ago, the world was introduced to Judge Neil Gorsuch, President Donald J. Trump’s nominee for the Supreme Court. Ten days later, after multiple meetings with Senators, Republican and Democrat alike, the support for Judge Gorsuch is incredible.

Here are just some of the positive things Senators had to say after meeting with Judge Gorsuch:

* “I would encourage all of my fellow Senators to meet with him, give him a fair shake. He deserves that.” –Sen. Jon Tester (D-MT)
* “I know he has a stellar record from the standpoint of his pedigree, how he came up through his education process, everything about him.” –Sen. Joe Manchin (D-WV)
* “I will push for a hearing and I will push for a vote.” –Sen. Chris Coons (D-DE)

[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=baf394c5cf0f103d6dc332820a18c70509aa7b7d614662754a7911ac5d040000c629e04bfa27e426703abd3118ccabc7cc67a103e96b34a7)
In all, eight Democrat senators have stated publicly that Judge Gorsuch deserves a hearing and a vote. Judge Gorsuch is bringing Senators together on both sides of the aisle.

There is no better choice to carry on Justice Antonin Scalia’s incredible legacy of protecting our freedoms.

In the coming weeks, as Judge Gorsuch meets with more Senators and continues the nomination process, he will need our support.

**[Stand with Judge Gorsuch today and let him know you support him.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=baf394c5cf0f103d8bae239067997f8b4a54f9a2a3274e8d747ce0025c300a7ad71063ae1bd27bc9959e98872db79b2d7b3ac1cfa9ac1b4e)**

**[Support Judge Gorsuch](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=baf394c5cf0f103d6dc332820a18c70509aa7b7d614662754a7911ac5d040000c629e04bfa27e426703abd3118ccabc7cc67a103e96b34a7)**

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=baf394c5cf0f103db821758988c15dfe4afbd372b7784039b745fd05b3d3b4e2ea6e5d09b9c8a0f96881b5423203700609a1ad8c5a148d06) [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=baf394c5cf0f103d01076f9fcebe30f1bff43ff1e1bf6f23f953d177bd31aeec822a161b215cf8cbac87e55b26ee8d7b0fe443e0637471cd)[Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=b92ce13652755cea9c1b97099d64270d141adb463266096055bf133fa14942045904ebcfd8bd573c170e0445da27121c05110e8108e6d36d)

Trump’s nominee for the Supreme Court. Ten days later, after multiple meetings with Senators, Republican and Democrat alike, the support for Judge Gorsuch is incredible. Here are just some of the positive things Senators had to say after meeting with Judge Gorsuch: “I would encourage all of my fellow Senators to meet with him, give him a fair shake. He deserves that.” –Sen. Jon Tester (D-MT) “I know he has a stellar record from the standpoint of his pedigree, how he came up through his education process, everything about him.” –Sen. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Hi team, meet Mindy.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Hi team, meet my boss Mindy. (Yes, even United States Senators have bosses.)
---
[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20170211-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Hi team, meet my boss Mindy.

(Yes, even United States Senators have bosses.)

Back in 2011, I had never run for office before -- not even student council. And a popular, handsome Republican with $10 million in the bank held the Senate seat I was considering running for in Massachusetts.

I needed help -- so I asked around, and everyone told me that I needed to talk to Mindy Myers. Mindy is from Pennsylvania -- her dad was a bus driver and her mom worked at Sears (like my mom!) -- and she's also one of the very best Democratic campaign managers in the country.

I convinced Mindy to move to Boston, run my campaign, and teach a first-time candidate how to fight and win. Mitch McConnell and the Republicans may try to keep me quiet, but I won't stop speaking out and fighting back. And a big part of the reason for that? Mindy.

**I 'm introducing you to Mindy Myers because I have terrific news: She's agreed to become the Executive Director of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee to help all of our 2018 Senate Democrats fight and win.**

[**Let 's give Mindy and our Senate Democrats the best possible start to fight for a Democratic Senate and stand up to Donald Trump in 2018. Donate now to the DSCC.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20170211-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

I'm not going to sugar coat it: 2018 is going to be a tough election for us. Democrats are defending 25 Senate seats in the midterm elections -- 10 of which are in states that Donald Trump won in 2016. Republicans have to defend only eight total -- and only one in a state that voted for Hillary Clinton.

The Republicans have money and power -- and a 2016 playbook full of nasty attacks that they'll use again to deepen their control of the Senate in 2018.

That's why I'm happy that Mindy's taking the helm of the DSCC. She's smart and steady -- and she knows what it's like to take on tough fights and stand up to the powerful interests. My campaign wasn't just some fluke.

In 2006, Mindy helped our friend and climate champion Sheldon Whitehouse beat Republican Lincoln Chafee. In 2008, she led then-Senator Barack Obama's win in New Hampshire in the general election. And in 2010, she helped Dick Blumenthal beat WWE wrestling mogul Linda McMahon despite being outspent by $42 million. You read that correctly: her candidate was outspent by _$42 million_ , and she still won! And now she's going to help Senator Chris Van Hollen as he heads up the DSCC in this all-important midterm election.

But I also know this: Mindy doesn't win tough fights like this alone. And as hard as we fight, neither can our Democratic Senators. It's going to take millions of people all across this country to fight back against Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, the billionaire Koch brothers, and all the powerful interests. Grassroots is how we won in 2012, and grassroots is how we'll win in 2018.

[**The DSCC is fighting hard to protect Senate Democrats and take back the majority -- but they need your help. Please donate now -- whatever you can afford -- to give Mindy and our Senate Democrats a fighting chance in 2018.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20170211-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ec85/2b07114c/450967f0/736ab1d8/1292788772/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ec85/2b07114c/450967f0/736ab1db/1292788772/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ec85/2b07114c/450967f0/736ab1da/1292788772/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---
